name: old-school-grit
description: Darrin Donnelly's Old School Grit — build perseverance, discipline, mental toughness, and a positive success mindset using nine timeless rules that never change
useCase: Helps anyone develop real grit through timeless principles: hard work, never quitting, discipline, positive attitude, responsibility, continuous learning, helping others, honesty, and faith.
knownRisks: Grit principles require consistent practice — knowing them isn't the same as living them
